targets.queryText:
SELECT
  strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%fZ', timestamp) as time,
  MAX(CASE WHEN sensorType = 'temp0' THEN value ELSE NULL END) as "cold-junction",
  MAX(CASE WHEN sensorType = 'temp1' THEN value ELSE NULL END) as "thermocouple-1",
  MAX(CASE WHEN sensorType = 'temp2' THEN value ELSE NULL END) as "thermocouple-2"
FROM sensor_measurements
WHERE 
  sensorName = 'ltc2983'
GROUP BY time
ORDER BY time
targets.rawQueryText:
SELECT
  strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%fZ', timestamp) as time,
  MAX(CASE WHEN sensorType = 'temp0' THEN value ELSE NULL END) as "cold-junction",
  MAX(CASE WHEN sensorType = 'temp1' THEN value ELSE NULL END) as "thermocouple-1",
  MAX(CASE WHEN sensorType = 'temp2' THEN value ELSE NULL END) as "thermocouple-2"
FROM sensor_measurements
WHERE 
  sensorName = 'ltc2983'
GROUP BY time
ORDER BY time

targets.queryText:
SELECT
  strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%fZ', timestamp) as time,
  MAX(CASE WHEN sensorName = 'h1-45_46' THEN value ELSE NULL END) as "h1-45_46",
  MAX(CASE WHEN sensorName = 'h1-49_50' THEN value ELSE NULL END) as "h1-49_50",
  MAX(CASE WHEN sensorName = 'h1-47_48' THEN value ELSE NULL END) as "h1-47_48",
  MAX(CASE WHEN sensorName = 'h1-51_52' THEN value ELSE NULL END) as "h1-51_52",
  MAX(CASE WHEN sensorName = 'h2-35_36' THEN value ELSE NULL END) as "h2-35_36",
  MAX(CASE WHEN sensorName = 'h2-25_26' THEN value ELSE NULL END) as "h2-25_26",
  MAX(CASE WHEN sensorName = 'h2-27_28' THEN value ELSE NULL END) as "h2-27_28"
FROM sensor_measurements
WHERE 
  measurementType = 'power'
GROUP BY time
ORDER BY time
